image_2aa279d5980ca4.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\Delta_y=\\begin{vmatrix}a&c\\\\b&c\\end{vmatrix}=ac-bc=c(a-b)","note":"二階行列式展開與因式分解"}

image_3b88699e0d8821.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=\\begin{vmatrix}3x_1 & x_1-x_2 \\\\ 3y_1 & y_1-y_2\\end{vmatrix}=3\\times\\begin{vmatrix}x_1 & x_1-x_2 \\\\ y_1 & y_1-y_2\\end{vmatrix}","note":"行列式提取公因數3"}

image_9c61e3b2a8cf7b.png.note: 二階行列式與向量長度乘積
image_9c61e3b2a8cf7b.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\begin{vmatrix}x_1&y_1\\\\x_2&y_2\\end{vmatrix}=\\left|\\overrightarrow{a}\\right|\\left|\\overrightarrow{b}\\right|>0","note":"二階行列式與向量長度乘積"}

image_b531f33e6d2fea.png.note: 行列式與向量長度乘積公式
image_b531f33e6d2fea.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\begin{vmatrix}x_1&y_1\\\\x_2&y_2\\end{vmatrix}=\\sqrt{x_1^2+y_1^2}\\times\\sqrt{x_2^2+y_2^2}","note":"行列式與向量長度乘積公式"}

image_b8e6d010ffa2f2.png.note: 線性方程式代入分數項

image_bd132f11b98c5d.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\Delta_x=\\begin{vmatrix}c&b\\\\c&a\\end{vmatrix}=ca-cb=c(a-b)","note":"二階行列式展開與因式分解"}
